ItacPersonItem.Notes: Molin was never formally affiliated to Badoer`s Accademia Veneziana, but he played an important role at the early stage of the Academy life. In 1558 he offered Bernardo Tasso to publish his `Amadigi` with the funds of the Academy. See his biography by Franco Tomasi in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
